name: Crack Lokshewa — Nepal Lok Sewa Mock Tests
description: Nepal's #1 free bilingual Lok Sewa Aayog mock test platform. Online practice model sets for Kharidar, Nayab Subba, Sakha Adhikrit, Nepal Police, Driving License, Staff Nurse, Computer Operator, IT, GK, Constitution, IQ & Livestock. 50 MCQs, timer & negative marking.
